description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The exterior features a mix of white and light gray walls, accented by large windows and several planted garden beds. There is a visible garage area with a blue car parked inside, and multiple outdoor spaces including a small patio and landscaped greenery. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The structure includes a combination of solid walls and open sections, suggesting a blend of indoor and outdoor living. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features clean lines, white and gray walls, and a visible garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage with a blue car, and landscaped garden beds along the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, additional windows, and a small patio area with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more garden beds, a patio, and the back entrance with grouped windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a fenced area, additional windows, and a landscaped section with a tree.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
